sections.paragraph:
(a verbal noun, from the root חָרַץ to cut, to sharpen).

(1) a cutting, piece cut off, τμῆμα. 1Sa 17:18, עֲשֶׂרֶת חֲרִיצֵי הֶחָלָב “ten cuttings of (thickened) milk (or of soft cheese).” LXX. τρυφαλίδες, i.e. according to Hesychius, τμήματα τοῦ ἁπαλοῦ τυροῦ. Vulg. decem formellœ casei. Arab. كريص (خ being changed into ك) soft cheese.

(2) sharpened, i.q. חָרוּץ No. 2. Specially of a sharp threshing instrument, 2Sa 12:31 1Ch 20:3.
